title: astragalus sempervirens subsp. muticus
intro: Astragalus sempervirens subsp. muticus, also known as Chinese milk vetch, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus sempervirens subsp. muticus include enhancing the immune system, reducing stress and fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and longevity.
